title: Skyrim Special Edition: Creation Kit (1946180)
text:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: Skyrim Special Edition: Creation Kit Quest "Dialogue Views" and "Scenes" menus are broken.
- Steam AppID of the game: 1946180

## System Information
- GPU: GTX 1070
- Video driver version: nvidia-driver-535 Version 535.113.01-0ubuntu0.22.04.1
- Kernel version: 5.15.0-86-generic
- System Info: https://gist.github.com/king-zoidberg/00e3f387baca0c2396c74b419bdaa1a2
- Proton version: 8.0-4 (same problem on all other available full releases as well as hotfix and experimental as of oct 9 2023)

## I confirm:
- [x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

- Proton Log: https://gist.github.com/king-zoidberg/fddbfeea4b7d5859ceb5bf940c5d7488

## Symptoms

The interactive flowchart used by the creation kit in the Scenes and Dialogue Views is not drawn (only a while box shows up in its place) and cannot be interacted with by right clicking (nothing happens on right click). Both the original Skyrim: Creation Kit (for the original release of the game not special edition) and the Fallout 4: Creation Kit correctly draw the flowchart and can be interacted with on proton 8.0-4.

## Reproduction

Load the base game data Skyrim.esm open a quest with a dialogue view or scene select the dialogue view or scene and the flowchart box on the right of the window remains unchanged.

title: Atomic Heart (668580)
text:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: [Atomic Heart](https://store.steampowered.com/app/668580/Atomic_Heart/?snr=1_4_4__118)
- Steam AppID of the game: 668580

## System Information
- GPU: Steam Deck
- Driver/LLVM version: Steam Deck
- Kernel version: Steam Deck
- Proton version: Proton 7.0-6

## I confirm:
- [x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

Log file: [steam-668580.log](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/files/10795381/steam-668580.log) that goes up to the difficulty selection where the first missing videos are.

## Symptoms 

None of the in-game videos work. There should be some on difficulty selection but they're blank.

There should also be videos on various screens on the game, they also don't play but you do hear the audio.

## Reproduction

Just try it with Proton, get to the difficulty screen when starting a new game, and notice the black boxes above the options.

It has also now been given a "Steam Deck Playable" rating, but since videos in-game are broken, it shouldn't even be set as Playable should it?

title: The Last of Us™ Part II Remastered (2531310)
text:
> # Compatibility Report
> 
> Name of the game with compatibility issues: The Last of Us™ Part II Remastered Steam AppID of the game: 2531310
> ## System Information
> 
>     * CPU: AMD Ryzen™ 7 5800H with Radeon™ Graphics × 16
> 
>     * GPU: RTX 3050 Laptop 4GB
> 

> The game starts normally, rendering around 30-50 fps on the menu screen and around 100-150 fps on the loading screen. However, as soon as the story begins, it drops to 1-2 fps making the game unplayable. This happens only when using the NVidia GPU. When using the Radeon integrated graphics I was able to render the game with around 30 fps using FSR at 720p.


Same issue here with the same gpu and same scenario where it is impossible to play the story as it is 1-3 fps when starting the story mode

metadata.issue_title: The Last of Us™ Part II Remastered (2531310)

title: Mortal Kombat 1 (1971870)
text:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: Mortal Kombat 1
- Steam AppID of the game: 1971870

## System Information
- GPU: RX 570
- Video driver version: Mesa 23.1.8
- Kernel version: 5.15.0-84-generic
- Link to full system information report as [Gist](https://gist.github.com/): [System Information](https://gist.github.com/TheVeilZ/f95ffea72943a546d83ae1edef138463)
- Proton version: Proton Experimental


## I confirm:
- [x ] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [x ] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.



## Symptoms 
Mortal Kombat 1 does not launch with Proton 8.0-3 or Experimental. It launches with GE 7-55, but never connects to online services when the game gets to that point.

Every time I try to launch the game with 8.0-3 or Experimental, Steam says the game is **Running**, but the game window never shows up.

## Reproduction
Select Proton 8.0-3 or Proton Experimental (vanilla or Bleeding Edge) and try to launch Mortal Kombat 1.



Proton Log: [steam-1971870.log](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/files/12695707/steam-1971870.log)
